titleEn: Väderstad launches new generation of Tempo T maize planters
titleZh: Väderstad推出新一代Tempo T玉米播种机，实现行距自动调节
summaryZh: 瑞典农机巨头Väderstad发布了新一代Tempo T伸缩式玉米播种机，包括T6（6行）和T7（7行）型号，最大亮点是行距自动调节功能。操作员只需在折叠状态下旋转选择器，播种机展开时行单元自动定位到所需间距（T6：45-70cm，T7：50-80cm），彻底告别手动调整。该机型还搭载了2025年Agritechnica展出的新行单元，预计2027年上市。
featuredReason: 该新闻展示了精准播种技术的最新进展——行距自动调节，大幅提升作业效率和精度，对智慧种植（尤其是玉米等大田作物）的自动化升级具有直接参考价值。
contentFull: Väderstad launches new generation of Tempo T maize planters 04-06 | Smart farming | NewsLinkedInFacebookXWhatsAppPrintMachinery manufacturer Väderstad has introduced a new generation of Tempo T telescopic maize planters. The most significant development is the automatic adjustment of row spacing. Photos: Väderstad.Swedish machinery manufacturer Väderstad has introduced a new generation of Tempo T telescopic planters. The new range comprises the T6 with six row units, the T7 with seven row units, and models featuring variable row spacing.Row spacing on the new Tempo T telescopic planters can be adjusted from 45 cm to 70 cm on the Tempo T6 and from 50 cm to 80 cm on the Tempo T7. Row spacing is adjusted using a rotary selector.With the machine in its folded position, the operator simply turns the selector to the desired setting. As the planter unfolds, the row units are automatically positioned at the selected spacing. On previous models, this adjustment had to be carried out manually by loosening, moving and re-tightening each individual row unit. The machine is also equipped with Väderstad’s new row units, which were introduced at Agritechnica 2025. Row spacing can be set using a selector located on the side of the machine. The operator chooses the desired spacing, after which the machine automatically positions the row units correctly during unfolding. This eliminates the need to adjust each row unit individually.Available from 2027The new generation of Tempo T planters will be available for the 2027 season. Väderstad has not yet announced the starting price of the machines.Join 17,000+ subscribersSubscribe to our newsletter to stay updated about all the need-to-know content in the agricultural sector, two times a week. translationZh:
瑞典机械制造商Väderstad推出了新一代Tempo T伸缩式播种机。新系列包括配备6个行单元的T6、配备7个行单元的T7以及具有可变行间距的型号。

新款Tempo T伸缩式播种机的行间距可在T6上从45厘米调整到70厘米，在T7上从50厘米调整到80厘米。行间距通过旋转选择器进行调整。

当机器处于折叠位置时，操作员只需将选择器转到所需设置。随着播种机展开，行单元会自动定位到所选间距。在之前的型号上，这种调整必须通过松开、移动和重新拧紧每个行单元来手动完成。该机器还配备了Väderstad在2025年Agritechnica展会上推出的新行单元。行间距可通过位于机器侧面的选择器进行设置。操作员选择所需间距，之后机器在展开过程中自动将行单元正确定位。这消除了单独调整每个行单元的需要。

**2027年起可用**

新一代Tempo T播种机将于2027年种植季上市。Väderstad尚未公布机器的起售价。
author: Lucas van de Weijer
contentHtml: Swedish machinery manufacturer Väderstad has introduced a new generation of Tempo T telescopic planters. The new range comprises the T6 with six row units, the T7 with seven row units, and models featuring variable row spacing.
